Short Description: Shawarma Chicken with a Red, White, and Green Sauce and Roasted Tri-Color Bell Peppers and Sweet Corn over Cumin Rice Pilaf
Long Description: Warm spiced chicken shawarma finished with a red, white, and green sauce, served with roasted tri-color bell peppers and sweet corn over cumin rice pilaf for a bold, layered plate with a bright, creamy finish.

Short Description: Chicken Tikka with a Mint Chutney and Saffron Roasted Cauliflower and Roasted Eggplant over Cardamom Basmati Rice
Long Description: Tender chicken tikka finished with a fresh mint chutney, served with saffron roasted cauliflower and roasted eggplant over cardamom basmati rice for a warm, aromatic plate with a bright, herbaceous finish.

Short Description: Pan Seared Chicken Breast with a Ruby Beet Whipped Feta and Roasted Sweet Potato, Roasted Broccoli, House Pickled Vegetables, and Dried Cranberries
Long Description: Pan seared chicken breast finished with a bright herb oil, layered over a ruby beet whipped feta with roasted sweet potato, roasted broccoli, house pickled vegetables, and dried cranberries for a striking, Mediterranean inspired plate with a clean, earthy finish.

Short Description: Braised Short Rib with a Red Wine Reduction and Roasted Mushrooms and Roasted Pearl Onions over Wild Rice
Long Description: Slow braised short rib finished with a rich red wine reduction, served with roasted mushrooms and roasted pearl onions over wild rice for a classic, deeply savory plate with an elegant, steakhouse inspired finish.

Short Description: Pan Seared Cod with a White Miso Glaze and Roasted Broccoli and Roasted Kabocha Squash over Wild Rice
Long Description: Pan seared cod broiled with a sweet white miso glaze, served with roasted broccoli and oven roasted kabocha squash over wild rice for a clean, Japanese inspired plate with a savory, umami finish.

Short Description: Crispy Albacore Tuna Cakes with a Spicy Yuzu Mayo and Pickled Cucumber, Miso Glazed Roasted Carrots, and Blistered Green Beans over Seasoned Sushi Rice
Long Description: Crispy albacore tuna cakes finished with a spicy yuzu mayo, served with pickled cucumber, miso glazed roasted carrots, and blistered green beans over seasoned sushi rice for a bold, Japanese inspired bowl with a bright, umami finish.

Short Description: Blackened Chicken Breast over Luxurious Shell Pasta with a Dairy Free Vodka Cream Sauce and Fresh Basil
Long Description: Tender blackened chicken breast layered over luxurious shell pasta and finished with a silky dairy free vodka cream sauce made from San Marzano tomatoes and coconut milk, topped with fresh basil for a rich, indulgent plate with a bright, Italian American finish.

Short Description: Crispy Seared Tofu with a Gochujang Glaze and Charred Broccoli and Roasted Cremini Mushrooms over Basmati Rice
Long Description: Extra firm tofu seared crispy and finished with a sweet spicy gochujang glaze, served with charred broccoli and roasted cremini mushrooms over basmati rice for a bold, Korean inspired plate with a fiery, umami finish.

Short Description: Our high protein and collagen rich lemongrass and coconut milk bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: Our signature lemongrass and coconut milk bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours with fresh lemongrass, ginger, and lime leaf.

Short Description: Strawberry chia pudding with a vanilla mascarpone cream and fresh strawberries
Long Description: Creamy strawberry chia pudding layered with a vanilla mascarpone cream and finished with fresh strawberries for a bright, dessert inspired treat.
